predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased). Directly assertable as a background fact in a case.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendants
predicates.description: The deceased leaves relatives in the ascending line.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased leaves close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: is_common_property_of_spouses
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the common matrimonial property of the deceased.

predicates.name: is_undivided_between_spouses
predicates.description: The asset is held in undivided co-ownership exclusively between the spouses.

predicates.name: is_own_property_of_deceased
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the own (separate) estate of the deceased.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.24.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.25.

predicates.name: reversion_excluded_by_deed_or_will
predicates.description: The deed of gift or the will provides otherwise regarding the usufruct on the asset subject to legal reversion.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendants_or_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased leaves relatives in the ascending line or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: surviving_spouse_acquires_full_ownership_common_share
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires full ownership of the deceased's share in the common matrimonial property or property held in undivided co-ownership exclusively between the spouses.

predicates.name: surviving_spouse_acquires_usufruct_own_property
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct over the other goods belonging to the deceased's own estate.

predicates.name: surviving_spouse_acquires_usufruct_reversion_property
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct over goods subject to the right of legal reversion under article 4.24 or 4.25, unless the deed of gift or will provides otherwise.
